title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Google India
jsonLd.description:
Google India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Vadodara office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
